component.name: Inbox icon
component.description: 24×24 inbox/tray stroke icon on a 40×40 frame with optional notification badge (Brand/Primary, Typography/Body-Small label on cream per Figma). Glyph paths match Figma-exported `inbox.svg` (24×24, stroke 2). Used in Top Header **Title + Inbox** (`231:817`). Variants in file: `Default` (badge visible, sample count 5) vs `No Notifications`.

codeProps.property1: Mirrors Figma `Property 1`; maps `Default` to the badge variant and `No Notifications` to the icon-only variant.
codeProps.badgeCount: Code-only override for the badge label when `property1=Default`.

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: Inbox Icon (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)

notes: 2026-04-10: Figma cleanup aligned the `COMPONENT_SET` to a vertical stack with 16px gap. Generic layers were renamed to `inbox-icon-glyph`, `inbox-icon-glyph-vector`, `inbox-icon-badge`, and `inbox-icon-badge-value`. `clipsContent` was cleared on the set and variant frames; no flattening was introduced in automation.

2026-04-10: TSX mirrors the renamed layer structure with `data-name` hooks and keeps `Property 1` mapped to `Default` / `No Notifications`; `badgeCount` remains a code-only override for the default variant.
